race.comment: KORATORA (5) drops back to the 900m burner over a month between runs and will find this easier. Draws to land in a perfect spot up on speed under Crowther and looks a big threat. STEEL TSUNAMI (3) didn't fire a shot fresh but has since gone back to the trials where he was first past the post. Blinkers go on first time and he gets an important 3kg claim. Not taking lightly. AZTEC DANCER (4) is a track and trip specialist but is yet to salute fresh. Watch for her darting through late. SIOUX WARRIOR (2) has struck a purple patch of form as he shoots for the hat-trick. Backs up quickly and deserves obvious respect.
race.rail_position: +12m from 900m to WP, +12m from WP to 1800m, +9 metres Remainder. (Pent: 6.56)
